text: Iconic and picturesque area with colorful buildings and historic boats
Enchanting atmosphere with beautiful gardens and thrilling amusement park rides
Renowned art museum showcasing the works of the Skagen Painters
Birthplace of the LEGO brick, offers a world of fun and creativity
Power sockets: Type A and Type K.
Currency: Danish Krone (DKK). Euros are not widely accepted.
Weather: Below -15 degrees Celsius in December.
Tap water is high-quality; carry a refillable bottle.
